title: Love You So Bad
overview: Sassy, confident and unapologetically herself, college senior Savannah is determined to live life on her own terms. She finds herself torn between two different men: bad boy and chick magnet L.A. who fuels her wild side, and principled and ambitious Vic who challenges her to grow. As old wounds resurface and difficult choices confront her, she must decide who she really wants to be and who she dares to love.
